instruction:
Find the intercepts and range of the function $f(x)=16x^2-13$.
Instructions: Type the x-intercept with the smaller x-coordinate first. Type+INF for infinity, and-INF for negative infinity. 
x-intercepts: ([ANS], [ANS]) and ([ANS], [ANS]) y-intercept: ([ANS], [ANS]) range: [[ANS], [ANS])
